title: Bela Church
tagline: Bela Church — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Bela Church, also Our Lady of Sorrows Church, is a Roman Catholic church in the Kasargode district of Kerala state, South India, 15 km north of Kasaragod, and 50 km away from Manga
overview.description: Bela Church, also Our Lady of Sorrows Church, is a Roman Catholic church in the Kasargode district of Kerala state, South India, 15 km north of Kasaragod, and 50 km away from Mangalore. It was built in 1890 and is the oldest church in the district. This Gothic Revival Roman Catholic church is under the Manglore Diocese. The church recently celebrated its centenary and undergone renovations.

topPlaces.description: Neerchal is a village in Kasaragod district of Kerala state, India. Neerchal is located 12 kilometers from Kasaragod.

topPlaces.description: Seethangoli is a small village located 11 km north of Kasaragod town and 18 km south of Uppala in Kasaragod District, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.description: Uppala Gate is a small town in Uppala, Kasaragod district, Kerala. It is located about 1 kilometre (0.62 mi) north from the Uppala town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bela Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bela Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bela Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (44 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bela Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bela Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bela Church?
faq.a: Stays in Bela Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bela Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Neerchal, Kasaragod, Seethangoli, Mugu, Kasaragod, Uppala Gate, Edanad, Kasaragod.
